readings.Aries: You function best when there is something to push against. Right now, push gently. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Taurus: Your relationship with money is your relationship with security. They are not the same thing. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Gemini: Something you said as a joke was your actual opinion. The joke was protective cover. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Cancer: You carry the emotional history of everyone you love. Set some of it down today. The first instinct was right.
readings.Leo: Someone underestimated you recently. The most satisfying response is excellence, delivered quietly. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Virgo: There's a problem you're solving with effort that could be solved with a single honest conversation. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Libra: Your instinct for what looks and feels right is calibrated finely. Trust it on the bigger questions too. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Scorpio: The investigation you're conducting on someone else — conduct it on yourself for a day. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Sagittarius: The adventure you need does not require travel. Change the frame of what's in front of you. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Capricorn: Your patience is a form of power. Today, deploy it on yourself. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Aquarius: Your version of intimacy is unusual and real. Someone is trying to understand it. Help them. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Pisces: Your sensitivity is a precision instrument. It is currently tuned to everyone else's signal. Let this one be easy.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
